Action: # Journal Reinstatement and Article Creation: Admin Journal and Article Actions
## Admin – Reinstate Journal and Add Article
Setup: Log in as ProfessorWobblethorpe, the admin
Select "Journals" and search for "Transactions of Paradoxical Botany"
From Bulk edit records, choose "Reinstate into DOAJ" and submit

Expected Test Results: Confirm the background job at /admin/background_jobs shows outcome fail
Confirm message "The journal could not be reinstated because at least one other record with matching ISSN(s) already exists in DOAJ"

Action: Go to "Transactions of Paradoxical Botany"'s admin form (link provided with the test)
Attempt to reinstate the journal by clicking the "Reinstate" button

Expected Test Results: The message is displayed "The journal could not be reinstated because at least one other record with matching ISSN(s) already exists in DOAJ"

Action: Click "Unlock & Close" on the journal page
In the CRUD Articles section, click "Post" and "Try it out"
Paste the article source provided with the test
Go to the "Advanced Transactions of Paradoxical Botany"'s page (link provided with the test)
Click "Articles" to search for journal's articles

Expected Test Results: Article "Investigating Photosynthetic Anomalies in Invisible Ferns" is listed
